steps.title: Read the graphed line
steps.content:
From the graph, line $g$ passes through $(-10,12)$ and $(0,1)$. Its slope is:
$$\frac{12-1}{-10-0}=-\frac{11}{10}$$
So its equation is $y=-\frac{11}{10}x+1$.

steps.title: Match the same line
steps.content:
For infinitely many solutions, $165x+py=w$ must be the same line. Multiply $11x+10y=10$ by $15$:
$$165x+150y=150$$
